highlights.text: Jaipur (2N) → Jodhpur (2N) → Jaisalmer (1N) → Udaipur (3N) grand circuit
Private executive luxury SUV with personal chauffeur
Camel safari and luxury desert camp at Sam Sand Dunes

itinerary.title: Maharaja Rajasthan Luxury Tour
itinerary.tagline: Jaipur • Jodhpur • Jaisalmer • Udaipur — 08 Nights / 09 Days
itinerary.overview: Embark on an epic voyage across a land defined by ancient forts, opulent heritage, and timeless grandeur. The Best Rajasthan Tour Package by TRAGUIN merges spectacular sights with majestic palaces across Jaipur, Jodhpur, Jaisalmer desert dunes, and Udaipur's romantic lakes. Elite FIT holiday with private executive luxury transport and TRAGUIN verified handpicked palace resorts. Meal plan: CP/MAPAI (breakfast and gourmet dinner). Best season: October to March.
itinerary.seo_title: RJ-007 | Maharaja Rajasthan Luxury Tour | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Ultra-luxury 08 Nights / 09 Days Rajasthan tour (RJ-007): Jaipur, Jodhpur, Jaisalmer desert camp, and Udaipur with Amber Fort, Mehrangarh Fort, and Lake Pichola cruise.

days.title: Arrival in Jaipur | Royal Greetings & Chokhi Dhani
days.description: Traditional royal welcome and evening at Chokhi Dhani ethnic village with folk dances and Rajasthani feast.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Royal Welcome, Chauffeured Hotel Transfer, Ethnic Cultural Village
Meals Included: Traditional Gourmet Welcome Dinner
Evening Experience: Cultural dance viewings and pottery workshops
Overnight Stay: Jaipur (Handpicked Luxury Palace)

days.title: Jaipur Full Day Sightseeing | Amber Fort & Hawa Mahal
days.description: Amber Fort with elephant or jeep ride, Sheesh Mahal, Hawa Mahal, City Palace, and Jantar Mantar.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Amber Fort, Hawa Mahal, City Palace, Jantar Mantar
Optional Activities: Hot air balloon ride over historic fortresses
Evening Experience: Shopping for precious gems at Johari Bazaar
Overnight Stay: Jaipur Luxury Palace

days.title: Jaipur to Jodhpur | Journey to the Sun City
days.description: Premium intercity drive to Jodhpur with sunset views over the blue city horizons.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Intercity scenic drive, blue city old quarter view
Meals Included: Premium Buffet Breakfast
Evening Experience: Relaxed evening walk inside old town streets
Overnight Stay: Jodhpur (Premium Heritage Hotel)

days.title: Jodhpur Sightseeing | Mehrangarh Fort & Jaswant Thada
days.description: Explore Mehrangarh Fort museums and Jaswant Thada white marble cenotaph. Optional zip-lining.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Mehrangarh Fort, Jaswant Thada, Umaid Bhawan Palace Museum
Optional Activities: Flying Fox zip-lining across fort battlements
Evening Experience: Fine dining at a rooftop restaurant facing the fort
Overnight Stay: Jodhpur Premium Hotel

days.title: Jodhpur to Jaisalmer | Camel Safari & Luxury Desert Camping
days.description: Sunset camel safari at Sam Sand Dunes with ultra-luxury tented stay, folk music, and stargazing.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Thar Desert dunes, Sunset Camel Trek
Optional Activities: Dune-bashing in a private 4x4 vehicle
Evening Experience: Live folk music performance and stargazing
Overnight Stay: Luxury Tented Desert Camp

days.title: Jaisalmer Fort to Udaipur | Living Fortress & Regal Lakes
days.description: Explore Jaisalmer Fort, Patwon-ki-Haveli, Salim Singh-ki-Haveli, and Gadisar Lake before transfer to Udaipur.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Golden Jaisalmer Fort, Historic Havelis, Gadisar Lake
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast
Evening Experience: Relaxing late evening arrival check-in at Udaipur
Overnight Stay: Udaipur (Premium Lakefront Resort)

days.title: Udaipur | City Palace & Lake Pichola Cruise
days.description: City Palace complex tour and private scenic boat cruise to Jag Mandir Palace.
activities: Sightseeing Included: City Palace, Lake Pichola Cruise, Jagdish Temple
Optional Activities: Crystal Gallery private tour
Evening Experience: Traditional dance show at Bagore-ki-Haveli
Overnight Stay: Udaipur Lakefront Resort

days.title: Udaipur | Saheliyon-ki-Bari & Monsoon Palace
days.description: Visit Saheliyon-ki-Bari gardens and Sajjangarh Monsoon Palace with panoramic lake views.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Saheliyon-ki-Bari, Sajjangarh Monsoon Palace, Fateh Sagar Lake
Optional Activities: Speedboating on Fateh Sagar Lake
Evening Experience: Farewell lakeside gala dinner
Overnight Stay: Udaipur Lakefront Resort

days.title: Udaipur Departure | Royal Farewell
days.description: Final luxury breakfast, souvenir shopping, and transfer to Udaipur Airport.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Airport departure transfer
Meals Included: Premium Buffet Breakfast

inclusions.text: Bespoke luxury stays at handpicked hotels and palace resorts
Daily multi-cuisine buffet breakfasts and dinners as listed
Private air-conditioned transport with an executive chauffeur
Complimentary sunset cruise on Lake Pichola in Udaipur
Traditional welcome amenities and personalized honeymoon treats
All parking fees, toll taxes, fuel costs, and driver allowances
Domestic or international airfares and train tickets
Monument entry fees, camera permits, and local guide hire
Personal expenses (laundry, room service, telephone calls)
Optional adventure activities like zip-lining or dune-bashing
Peak seasonal surcharges or mandatory gala dinner fees
